recent_form: Fourth at the 2025 SJM Macau Open; led Round 1 of the International Series Philippines (Oct 2025); ranked roughly 25th on the Asian Tour Order of Merit at that point.

this_event.name: Bangkok Classic 2026 (Asian Development Tour)
this_event.summary: Round 1: 62 (−10), bogey-free — eight birdies and an eagle on the 18th for a new Phoenix Gold course record and a two-shot lead.

fun_facts: His opening 62 is the new course record at Phoenix Gold Golf Bangkok.
Says playing at home — and his mum’s cooking — keeps him relaxed.
